description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a paved driveway and several trees. The house features large rectangular windows on the front and sides, allowing for ample natural light. The main entryway is set back from the street, accessible via a short walkway flanked by landscaping and a driveway with parked vehicles. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or concrete, with clean lines and little ornamentation. The roof includes a central recessed area, possibly for a skylight or rooftop terrace. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and includes a small front yard with a mix of mature and young trees.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a paved driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees. The design is minimalist with clean lines and a recessed rooftop area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with parked cars, and landscaped yard with several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, large window openings, and the driveway extending along the side of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the recessed rooftop area and the back landscaping, with fewer visible windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, additional parked vehicles, and more of the side landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a simple door, short walkway, and minimal decorative elements
